reason: The rule requires ensuring the system uses a supported FIPS subpolicy. Modifying the subpolicy can alter cryptographic behavior, potentially breaking services or reducing security. Such changes are considered FIPS configuration changes, which the policy flags as too dangerous to remediate without careful planning.
estimated_impact: reboot required; Potential loss of cryptographic functionality; Possible system breakage or service disruption; Security downgrade if unsupported subpolicy is enabled
